steps.title: Apply the geologic rule
steps.content: The first sentence gives a rule: an intrusion is younger than the rocks it cuts through. The second sentence applies that rule to a specific formation, so the transition should show a logical result or application.

steps.title: Choose a result transition
steps.content: B signals concession, C signals purpose, and D signals an added separate point. The second sentence does not contrast, state a goal, or add an unrelated point; it follows from the rule. The answer is A.
